name: Super Fighting Robots
description: The most epic war game is now available. Play now to : "Super Fighting Robots Defense". Defend your spaceship against aliens invaders. They have started to invade the galaxy and destroy all life. The last hope...: the new Spaceship: BOMBER 2000. A powerfull weapon that should destroy the invaders, and end the stars war... But this spaceship is not finished yet. You must protect BOMBER 2000 from the invaders
